title: Grubo's Balance Pack
description: This is the balance pack, a modpack made for adventure, made for building stories. all possible with the chipped mod and a lot more. download now and start your quest!
body:
This Modpack was created with keeping the vanilla feel to the game in mind, aswell as making sure it add as much fun as it is exciting! This Pack will blow you away with so much *yet simple Mods. my pack favorites are some like *Expanded Storage, Chipped, and Advanced Netherite! if you like these mods there plenty more in the pack thats just as awesome!

!WARNING! 
This pack does recommend for 6GB-8GB of Ram
as well as a good GPU
